job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

job_title: View job: Production Test Technician-Instrument Assembly
job_description:
• 2 years associate degree or 1+ years of technician experience in capital equipment production field.
• Hands on experience on assembly and/or testing of complex electromechanical/optic systems.
• Hands on experience using basic hand tools to assemble and disassemble equipment, including screwdrivers, wrenches, torque-wrenches, soldering equipment, wiring tools, etc.
• Basic trouble shooting skills on electrical/electronic/mechanical/laser/optic system.
• Strong team collaboration skills, detail-oriented and excellent organization and prioritization skills.
• Strong communication skills: listening, speaking, writing, and interacting.
• Must be flexible, forward-thinking, motivated, and have the ability to act independently while balancing a broad range of organizational needs Proficient computer skills using Windows, MS-Office, and other PC based software.
• Relevant experience in life sciences/laboratory instrumentation production, GMP, GLP, QC, IQ/OQ/PQ, 5S, lean manufacturing, ISO 9001 environment and tools – ERP, Work Order, Batch Record, Arena, Oracle, QMS etc.
